'''warana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scalarisation|scalarisation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scalarisation|scalarisation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| warana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wærænæth|wærænæth]] || [[word:wærænæj|wærænæj]] || [[word:wærænæsh|wærænæsh]] || [[word:wærænæ|wærænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wararanath|wararanath]] || [[word:wararanaj|wararanaj]] || [[word:wararanash|wararanash]] || [[word:wararana|wararana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:waranath|waranath]] || [[word:waranaj|waranaj]] || [[word:waranash|waranash]] || [[word:warana|warana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:warafnath|warafnath]] || [[word:warafnaj|warafnaj]] || [[word:warafnash|warafnash]] || [[word:warafnaf|warafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:waranatha|waranatha]] || [[word:waranaja|waranaja]] || [[word:waranasha|waranasha]] || [[word:waranaka|waranaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:waranath|waranath]] || [[word:waranaj|waranaj]] || [[word:waranash|waranash]] || [[word:warana|warana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:waranathal|waranathal]] || [[word:waranajal|waranajal]] || [[word:waranashal|waranashal]] || [[word:waranakal|waranakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:waranathatha|waranathatha]] || [[word:waranajaja|waranajaja]] || [[word:waranashasha|waranashasha]] || [[word:waranaka|waranaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:waranathan|waranathan]] || [[word:waranajan|waranajan]] || [[word:waranashan|waranashan]] || [[word:waranakan|waranakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:waranathaoro|waranathaoro]] || [[word:waranajaoro|waranajaoro]] || [[word:waranashaoro|waranashaoro]] || [[word:waranakaoro|waranakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
